args: U=(); [ "$(uname -s)" = Linux ] && U=(--userns=keep-id:uid=65532,gid=65532); exec podman run "${U[@]}" --rm -i --network=host -v "${KUBECONFIG}:/kubeconfig:ro,Z" --entrypoint /app/kubernetes-mcp-server quay.io/ecosystem-appeng/openshift-mcp-server:latest --kubeconfig /kubeconfig --toolsets core,config,helm,kubevirt,observability,ossm
openshift.description: Red Hat Openshift MCP server for interacting with Openshift Container Platform clusters and its operators

podman.description: Podman MCP server for container image management and local builds

github.description: GitHub MCP server for repository browsing and code analysis

lightspeed-mcp.description: Red Hat Lightspeed MCP server for vulnerability, advisor, inventory, and planning data from Red Hat Insights (optional, used by /debug-rhel and /rhel-deploy)
